migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT ambition_level, COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE ambition_level IN ('curious','aspirational','distinguished') GROUP BY ambition_level

verificationResult.note: Zero legacy rows — all production users have a valid current ambition_level value (casual/professional/diplomatic)

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('learning_track_questions','learning_track_progress') ORDER BY table_name

verificationResult.note: Both tables exist with all required indexes: ltq_lookup_idx, ltq_hash_idx (unique), ltp_user_with_pillar_idx (partial, pillar IS NOT NULL), ltp_user_no_pillar_idx (partial, pillar IS NULL)

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT region_code, is_published FROM compass_regions WHERE region_code IN ('NL','CA','PT','ZA') ORDER BY region_code

verificationResult.note: All 21 ACTIVE_REGIONS now have is_published=true and en-GB content.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('badges','user_badges') ORDER BY table_name

verificationResult.note: badges table seeded with 568 rows (21 regions × pillars/phase/country + ambassador). Seed SQL is now embedded in the migration file (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). user_badges has UNIQUE(user_id, badge_id).

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='learning_track_progress' AND column_name='region_code'

verificationResult.note: region_code TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GB' added. Partial unique indexes rebuilt to include region_code, enabling per-region progress tracking. Phase/country badge prerequisites are now correctly scoped by region.
